name: Miswak Sticks
description: Salvadora persica twigs containing natural antimicrobials and silica for gentle abrasion — WHO-recognized as effective for oral hygiene, producing zero plastic waste.
shelfLife: 1–2 weeks per stick; dry sticks last months
effectivenessNote: WHO-endorsed. Contains natural antimicrobials and silica abrasive. Effective for plaque removal but less precise than modern toothbrush for reaching all surfaces.
warnings: Trim tip every few days to refresh bristles
Technique matters — ensure you reach all tooth surfaces
Source from reputable suppliers for genuine Salvadora persica
scienceNote: Salvadora persica contains benzyl isothiocyanate (antimicrobial), silica (abrasive), and fluoride. Multiple clinical trials show comparable plaque reduction to conventional brushing.
